title: delphinium helveticum
intro: Delphinium helveticum, also known as the Alpine Delphinium, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative properties, which are believed to help with digestive issues, muscle spasms, and anxiety. The health benefits of Delphinium helveticum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote relaxation, and ease menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Delphinium helveticum include infusions, tinctures, and ointments that can be used to soothe a variety of ailments.
